title: Horizon Drift
description:
A meditation on transitional spaces between land and sea.
Soft layers of ultramarine and warm ochre
build a memory of the coast at dusk.

title: Verdant Stillness
description:
Interplay of organic forms and geometric restraint.
Botanical motifs are abstracted into rhythmic gestures,
evoking the quiet pulse of a greenhouse.

title: Pulse & Echo
description:
Collaged textiles and pigment on panel.
This piece explores the resonance of memory through fractured surfaces and repeated marks.

title: Lunar Glaze
description:
A ceramic work that captures the fleeting quality of moonlight on water.
The surface shifts between matte and gloss, inviting touch.

title: Rust Veil
medium: Iron oxide, beeswax on canvas, 100×80 cm
description: Earthy and atmospheric, this encaustic work uses rust pigments and wax to evoke the patina of industrial decay and natural reclamation.

title: Fugue in Blue
description:
A lyrical abstraction in indigo and cerulean.
The fluid marks suggest movement, wind, and the tension between control and release.
